imports.configStrings: Always import from src/config/ — never hardcode route paths, table names, localStorage keys, or plan names

stateManagement.preferred: useAuth(), useData(), useUI() — specific context hooks
stateManagement.legacy: useApp() — compatibility wrapper combining all 3 contexts

conventions.errorHandling: Always log with [FileName] prefix. Never empty catch. Use getUserMessage() from utils/errors.ts
conventions.styling: Tailwind CSS utility classes. Brand color: indigo. See tailwind.config.js

testing.framework: none — tests not yet set up
